steps.t: Carlo Blagrove is at The Bird and Baby in Michel Delving. You should collect Old Winyards from The Bird and Baby, which will be delivered to Saerthuit…
Saerthuithel is in Echad Candelleth in the Trollshaws. You should bring the Old Winyards, cleverly disguised as Brandy Wine, to Saerthuithel as soon a…
